post.message: LLM judge reported the PR title claims a fix that the changed non-test code does not plausibly exercise. Deterministic checks did not fire, but the judge's reading of intent vs. diff disagrees.
post.judgeRationale: The PR title claims to fix a threading issue for the post-compact re-injection result, but the provided diff only contains changes to test files and the implementation of the `post-compact` hook itself, without showing any modifications to the `AgentLoop` class or other callers that would propagate this change to fix a broader code path.
